classifications.label: GHOST
classifications.note: Oversized payloads are rejected before storage.

new_traps.hypothesis: Accepted payloads are stored without any content validation step.
new_traps.label: NEW
new_traps.note: The accepted payload is passed directly to storage.
new_traps.remediation: Add a validation or scanning step before storage.

spec_mutations: Specify whether accepted payloads require validation before storage.
decision_rationale: The NEW finding has a concrete remediation.
